claimText: ICRISAT is a non-profit research centre located in Hyderabad, Telangana, established under the CGIAR consortium.
evidenceExcerpt: Located in Hyderabad, Telangana, and established as a non-profit research centre under the CGIAR consortium in the 1970s.
examUse: Statement-based question on ICRISAT's location and parent consortium.
distractorHooks: Located in New Delhi or Bengaluru

claimText: ICRISAT's primary aim is to improve food security in semi-arid regions and support smallholder farmers in drylands globally.
evidenceExcerpt: Aims to improve food security in semi-arid regions and support smallholder farmers in drylands.
examUse: Statement-based question on the mandate of ICRISAT.

claimText: ICRISAT developed the world's first pigeon pea hybrid.
evidenceExcerpt: Awarded the Africa Food Prize in 2021 and developed the world's first pigeon pea hybrid.
examUse: Fact-based statement or correct-pair question regarding agricultural achievements.
distractorHooks: Developed by ICAR instead of ICRISAT

claimText: ICRISAT collaborated with the Research and Information System for Developing Countries (RIS) to launch the ICRISAT Centre of Excellence for South-South Cooperation.
evidenceExcerpt: Launched the ICRISAT Centre of Excellence for South-South Cooperation in collaboration with Research and Information System for Developing Countries (RIS).
examUse: Statement-based question on recent collaborations and South-South Cooperation initiatives.
